step01/.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownload.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 21 compatibility.
step01/.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownload.why_exists: Paths.get() is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it may cause compile warnings or errors depending on compiler settings, and Path.of() is the mandated replacement.

step01/.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownload.general_idea: Remove unused import java.nio.file.Paths after migrating to Path.of().

step01/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
step01/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features or meet the target JDK requirement.

step01/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot.
Explicitly set the release configuration in the maven-compiler-plugin to 21.
